name: Witchcrafter Unit Jeweler
desc:
2 Spellcaster monsters, include a level 5 or higher monster
You can only Special Summon 1 "Witchcrafter Unit Jeweler" per turn.
If this card is Special Summoned: add 1 "Witchcrafter" Spell/Trap from your Deck to your hand, then you can destroy 1 card on field.
(Quick Effect): Tribute this card, then Special Summon up to 2 Spellcaster monsters in your GY, include a "Witchcrafter" monster.
